═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
🎥 YOUTUBE COMMENT MONITOR - CRON JOB SETUP COMPLETE
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

LOCATION: /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/

📦 FILES CREATED:
  ✓ youtube-monitor.py           - Main monitoring script
  ✓ youtube-monitor-report.py    - Analytics & reporting CLI
  ✓ youtube-monitor-setup.md     - Detailed setup instructions
  ✓ YOUTUBE_MONITOR_README.md    - Quick start & usage guide
  ✓ youtube-monitor-heartbeat.sh - Heartbeat integration script

🎯 WHAT IT DOES:

  Every 30 minutes (via cron), the monitor will:
  
  1. FETCH new comments from Concessa Obvius channel (5 recent videos)
  2. CATEGORIZE each comment:
     • Questions   (how to, tools, cost, timeline)
     • Praise      (amazing, inspiring, love)
     • Spam        (crypto, MLM, suspicious)
     • Sales       (partnership, collaboration, brand deals)
     • Other       (everything else)
  3. AUTO-RESPOND to Questions & Praise with templates
  4. FLAG sales inquiries for human review
  5. LOG everything to .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl

⚙️ QUICK START:

  1. Install: pip install google-auth-oauthlib google-api-python-client
  
  2. Get YouTube API credentials:
     - Go to: https://console.cloud.google.com/
     - Create project → Enable YouTube Data API v3
     - Create OAuth 2.0 Desktop credentials
     - Download & save to: ~/.openclaw/youtube-credentials.json
  
  3. Set channel ID:
     - Edit: .cache/youtube-monitor.py
     - Replace CHANNEL_ID with Concessa Obvius channel ID
     - Get from channel "About" tab (starts with UC)
  
  4. Test: python3 .cache/youtube-monitor.py
     Should print a report with comment counts
  
  5. Install cron job:
     crontab -e
     Add: */30 * * * * cd /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace && python3 .cache/youtube-monitor.py >> .cache/youtube-monitor.log 2>&1

📊 MONITORING & REPORTS:

  View all comments:
    cat .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq .
  
  Get full report:
    python3 .cache/youtube-monitor-report.py
  
  Recent activity (6h):
    python3 .cache/youtube-monitor-report.py recent 6
  
  Sales opportunities:
    python3 .cache/youtube-monitor-report.py sales
  
  Unanswered questions:
    python3 .cache/youtube-monitor-report.py questions
  
  Top commenters:
    python3 .cache/youtube-monitor-report.py commenters 10

📈 LOG FORMAT:

  Each comment logged as JSON (one per line):
  {
    "timestamp": "2026-04-20T06:30:00",          // When processed
    "comment_timestamp": "2026-04-19T22:15:00Z", // When posted
    "commenter": "User Name",
    "text": "Full comment text",
    "category": "questions|praise|spam|sales|other",
    "response_status": "none|sent|flagged",
    "likes": 5,
    "video_id": "abc123xyz"
  }

🔧 CUSTOMIZATION:

  • Edit TEMPLATES in youtube-monitor.py to customize responses
  • Edit CATEGORIES to add/adjust comment patterns
  • Set CHANNEL_ID to monitor different channels
  • Modify categorization logic as needed

✅ STATUS:

  Current time: Sunday, April 19th, 2026 — 11:30 PM PST
  Next run (with cron): 12:00 AM (midnight)
  After that: Every 30 minutes

🚀 NEXT STEPS:

  1. Complete YouTube API setup (see step ⚙️ #2)
  2. Update CHANNEL_ID in .cache/youtube-monitor.py
  3. Run test: python3 .cache/youtube-monitor.py
  4. Install cron job (see step ⚙️ #5)
  5. Optional: Add to HEARTBEAT.md for regular status checks
